completion_summary: Rendered the reviewer summary and the review_report markdown body in the structured branch of the shared review report panel, so approved zero-issue reviews no longer collapse to a bare No issues line. Branches stay mutually exclusive so the body renders once. Updated and added tests; mix precommit green. Changes left uncommitted per operator instruction.

after_doing_result.output: mix precommit passed: 4554 tests and 11 doctests with zero failures, mix format check clean, mix credo --strict clean, mix sobelow clean, dark mode scan 0 failing / 76 pairs.

before_review_result.output: No before_review commands configured in .stride.md; nothing to run.

completion_notes: Fixed the review queue hiding the reviewer summary and the report body for approved structured reviews. The shared review report panel previously took its structured branch whenever the payload carried structured content and rendered only the issue list, so an approved review with zero issues collapsed to a bare No issues line and both the reviewer summary and the markdown report body were invisible. The structured branch of structured_view now also renders the reviewer summary as escaped text and the review_report markdown body through the existing render_markdown helper, alongside the issue list. The structured and fallback branches stay mutually exclusive through the cond in pick_branch, so the body is never rendered twice. The summary is rendered in the panel per acceptance criterion one rather than added to the LiveView header, which shows the task's own description and would otherwise duplicate the text, so review_live was intentionally left untouched. Earmark escapes raw HTML by default, verified that a script payload renders as escaped entities, so no new injection surface is introduced. Updated two pre-existing tests that asserted the old owned-by-parent behavior, added a new test covering the approved zero-issue summary-and-body path, and corrected one view component test. Also refreshed the stale moduledoc so it describes what the panel actually renders. Per the operator instruction the working tree changes were left uncommitted. mix precommit is green: 4554 tests and 11 doctests with zero failures, credo strict clean, format clean, sobelow clean, and the dark mode scan reports zero failing across 76 pairs.

explorer_result.summary: Explored the shared review report panel, the review_live page, and the panel and view component test suites to locate the structured branch and the existing render_markdown helper before implementing.

reviewer_result.summary: Reviewed the structured branch change that renders the reviewer summary and the review_report body alongside the issue list. Confirmed the no-double-render guarantee, the panel-versus-header design for acceptance criterion one, dark mode safety, the HTML escaping posture, and test quality. Approved with one minor stale-moduledoc nit, which was then fixed.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Structured branch renders the reviewer summary when present.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: lib/kanban_web/components/review_report_panel.ex structured_view renders the summary guarded by a binary and non-empty check.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: The review_report markdown body is visible even when reviewer_result is structured.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: structured_view renders the body via render_markdown, reusing the fallback branch helper.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: An approved review with zero issues shows its summary and notes, not only No issues.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: New test in review_report_panel_test asserts summary plus body plus the coexisting empty-issues note.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Existing verdict pills, acceptance checklist, security considerations section, and issue list still render unchanged.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: review_live remains untouched in the working tree; the issue list still renders in the panel.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: New rendering verified in light and dark mode.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Dark mode scan exits zero; classes are theme-aware with no hardcoded colors.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: New tests cover the approved structured summary-and-report rendering and mix precommit is green.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: 117 panel and view component tests pass; full precommit reports zero failures.

testing_strategy.note: New test covers the approved zero-issue path; pre-existing inverted-behavior tests were updated; string-key coverage retained.

patterns.note: Body reuses the existing render_markdown helper, and string-keyed Map.get matches the established jsonb access pattern.

pitfalls.note: Issue list preserved; structured and fallback branches mutually exclusive so the body renders once; theme-aware classes only; string-key access honored.

security_considerations.note: Summary is HEEx-escaped text; body uses Earmark which escapes raw HTML, verified a script payload renders as escaped entities, so no new injection surface is added.
